field_values.action_summary: After hours of isolation, the protagonist uses intense mental willpower to break the paralysis. Upon standing, he realizes he has undergone a metamorphosis: his new, naked self stands upright while his original, clothed body remains lying lifeless on the cave floor.
field_values.emotional_beat: From intense mental struggle to profound shock and existential horror.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of physical effort/struggle; Wide/Medium reveal shot containing both naked standing figure and clothed lying body; Close-ups of facial realization
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Exact spatial distance between the old clothed body and the new naked body
Lighting consistency across both versions of the character in a single frame
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the supernatural metamorphosis reveal by transitioning from a physical struggle against paralysis to the visual discovery of a dual existence. The shot must capture both the newly transformed naked protagonist and his original clothed corpse in a single frame to establish the existential horror.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self): Naked, agile, post-transformation state.
- protagonist (The "Old" Body): Clothed, lifeless, prone on floor.

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave: Deep shadows, rocky cave floor.

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial distance between the old clothed body and the new naked body.
- Lighting consistency across both versions of the character in a single frame.

## Beat List
- BT001: Physical struggle against paralysis.
- BT002: Breaking paralysis and standing.
- BT003: Discovery of metamorphosis.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
